title: antennaria luzuloides var. microcephala
intro: Antennaria luzuloides var. microcephala, a lesser-known variety of the mountain everlasting plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Antennaria luzuloides var. microcephala include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, tincture, or infusible powder to harness its medicinal properties.
